title: CVE-2026-3419 - Fastify's Missing End Anchor in "subtypeNameReg" Allows Malforme

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-3419 - Fastify's Missing End Anchor in "subtypeName
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/07
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*field.content*'
            - '*httpwg.org*'
            - '*rfc9110.html*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
